Careers
HUMANS MAKE POSSIBLE EVERYTHING THAT WE DO!

Working at RAPS isn’t just a job — it’s meaningful, hands-on work that changes lives. From our shelter and sanctuary to our thrift stores and community-owned veterinary hospital, there are opportunities for people at every stage of their career to grow, contribute, and make a real difference for animals.

Employment opportunities are posted here as they arise, and we always welcome resumes and expressions of interest from compassionate, mission-driven people.

SUBMIT RESUME

We’re also powered by an incredible community of volunteers who support every part of our work. If you’re ready to give your time and heart to animals in need, there’s a role for you here.

VOLUNTEER

JOIN OUR COMMUNITY

Stay informed. Learn of our triumphs and challenges.

Be the first to discover new opportunities. Become a part of RAPS and get our newsletter!

SUBSCRIBE
ACHIEVING EXCELLENCE IN OUR COMMUNITY

Regional Animal Protection Society (RAPS) is a no-kill animal services agency that operates the RAPS Animal Hospital, what is now Canada’s largest cat sanctuary and an adoption centre.
